query:
UPDATE guild_settings
        SET dead_chat_rate = NULL,
        dead_chat_channel = NULL,
        last_dead_chat = NULL,
        quotes_channel = NULL,
        spoiler_channel = NULL,
        prefix = NULL,
        ai_chat_channel = NULL,
        global_chat_channel = NULL,
        global_chat = FALSE,
        global_music = FALSE,
        global_call = FALSE,
        music_channel = NULL,
        waifu_channel = NULL,
        waifu_rate = NULL,
        last_waifu = NULL,
        chatbot_role = NULL,
        current_voice_channel = NULL
    	WHERE guild_id = $1
